description: The creative team at Acme Corp needs a shared workspace to collaborate on the 'Campaign 2026' project. Set up a shared environment by creating a Unix group named 'creative_team' containing users 'jordan' and 'alex'. Create a directory at '/home/acmecorp/campaign_2026' owned by user 'acmecorp' and group 'creative_team'. Ensure members of the group have full Read/Write/Execute access while others have no access. The directory must have the SetGID bit enabled so that new files inherit the 'creative_team' group ownership.
